name: UK Payrolled Employees (PAYE RTI)
notes: ONS PAYE Real Time Information payrolled-employee count (UK all-industries SA), §2.B B8. A document-style ONS dataset (not a CDID timeseries) fetched two-step via the beta /data alias -> XLSX by sources/ons_rti.py. Monthly proxy for the UK employment level (the closest free analogue to US nonfarm payrolls). Verified live 2026-07-15: 143 obs 2014-07 -> 2026-05 = 30253517 persons.
